_comment: Canonical example for the INFRASTRUCTURE_IMPACT block emitted by the solution-architect inside outputs/phase-2-architecture.md. Per-infra-repo entries listing resources added, modified, or removed. The JSON is the structured INDEX consumed by Phase 5d (terraform-implementer / cdk-stack-implementer) to enumerate the changes per repo. Detailed configuration (cross-stack references, IAM policies, naming conventions) lives in the prose under each repo's section. Field reference lives in docs/file-formats.md. If a feature has no infrastructure impact, emit `{"infra_changes": []}` rather than omitting the block.

resources_added.name: BookUploadBucket
resources_added.summary: S3 bucket for book file storage

resources_added.name: BookProcessingQueue
resources_added.summary: SQS queue receiving S3 ObjectCreated notifications

cross_stack_refs.purpose: publisher worker consumes from this queue

resources_added.name: aws_iam_role.book_uploader
resources_added.summary: IAM role for the upload service

resources_modified.name: aws_s3_bucket_policy.uploads
resources_modified.summary: Add put permission for book_uploader role
